hero.subtitle: A community of faith, hope, and love. Join us as we worship together and grow in Christ.

bible.quote: "For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life."

blogs.highlightsDesc: Key announcements, quotes, offers and community moments

footer.description: A community of faith, hope, and love. Join us for worship and fellowship.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Mission For Nation. All rights reserved.

about.headerDesc: Discover our mission, vision, and the journey that brought us here.
about.missionText: To glorify God by making disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything Christ commanded.
about.visionText: To see a world transformed by the love of Christ, where every community has a vibrant, multiplying church that reflects God's Kingdom on earth.
about.timelineDesc: The milestones that have shaped our community over the years.

timelineCards.t1_desc: Started with a small group of 15 members gathering in a living room for prayer and worship.
timelineCards.t2_desc: Moved into our first dedicated worship space to accommodate growing attendance.
timelineCards.t3_desc: Began our first major community service initiative, serving over 500 local families.
timelineCards.t4_desc: Sent out our first dedicated team of long-term missionaries overseas.

about.founderDesc: Pastor Yohannes, visionary leader and faithful servant of Christ, planted this church with a heart for the city.

services.heroSubtitle: Find a church community near you to worship, serve, and grow together.

branchDetail.planVisitDesc: We'd love to have you join us! Everyone is welcome.

gallery.heroSubtitle: Stay connected with what's happening in our community
gallery.noPostsDesc: No posts match your current filters. Try adjusting your selection.
